_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of infrastructure-as-code principles and tooling (e.g., Terraform, Pulumi) as applied to data platform provisioning and configuration management.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-T-005 (TF, cosine: 0.540), DQ-K-007 (DQ, cosine: 0.519).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.644). Shared vocabulary: [configuration, knowledge, management]. DCWF-only terms [techniques] vs WIDAI-only terms [applied, code, data, infrastructure, platform, principles] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.904 (P=0.956, R=0.858). P exceeds R by 0.097 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of configuration management techniques." and "Knowledge of infrastructure-as-code principles and tooling (e.g., Terraform, Pul" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.548 < STS 0.644 (gap -0.095). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [techniques] and [applied, code, data] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.0%. Shared tokens: [configuration, knowledge, management]. DCWF-only: [techniques]. WIDAI-only: [applied, code, data, infrastructure, platform, principles].
